text:
Once upon a time in the quiet town of Greenwood, there lived a girl named Lily. She loved storybooks. Every evening, after her chores, she'd escape into the world of kings and heroes. Her favorite book was "The Princess Bride." Whenever she heard amusing tales, she dreamed of adventure.

One humid summer afternoon, while flying her paper crane wing flap, Lily stumbled upon a old, weathered book stuck between the pages of a ancient oak. It smelled like dew. She opened it to discover a tale of her own destiny.

In the land of Eldoorman, there lived a queen who loved music. But her favorite instrument? A phoenix flute. One winter night, as snowflakes danced like stars, the flute sang a sorrowful tune. A spirit of peace wanted the queen to listen. But the queen fell asleep.

The next morning, she dreamt of a prince. They fell madly in love. But the prince went off to war. When he returned years
